title: Jones, Marcus -  Treasurer of His Majesty’s Household (Deputy Chief Whip)
body: "The Rt Hon Sir Marcus left his role as Deputy Chief Whip in July 2024.  Amathus Strategy Limited and E-PPL Group  Sir Marcus announced his independent consultancy and began work with E-PPL Group before ACOBA had considered and provided its advice. ACOBA refused to provide advice as a result of this breach of the Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  ACOBA reported this breach to government. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
